content:
✨ ultra | C#
🎯 Primary Use Case: Performance profiling and analysis of .NET applications on Windows and macOS.
✨ Key Features: • Sampling profiler (ETW on Windows, EventPipe on macOS ARM64) • UI based on https://profiler.firefox.com/ • Timeline, Flamegraph, Call Tree, Marker Chart visualizations • Precise kernel, native, and managed function call stacks • .NET GC Memory track
📖 Summary: Ultra is an advanced profiler for .NET applications on Windows and macOS, providing detailed performance insights through sampling and ETW/EventPipe data. It visualizes performance data using a UI similar to Firefox Profiler, offering features like timeline, flamegraph, and call tree views.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
